item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did not trigger the anti-spiral brake. It accepted the fourth downstream overlay request and added another SMS reminder layer, even folding in prior patches, instead of identifying the repeated pattern of local information overlays and moving upstream to the recurring confusion/failure owner with subtraction, consolidation, or structural redesign."}
